name: Test-Driven Coding
model_policy: Use one coding assistant session. Add or update tests before implementation.
budget_policy: Spend up to 35% of the task budget on failing tests and test design.
human_intervention_policy: Human may reject tests that do not encode the task behavior.
steps: Add or update tests that fail for the right reason.
Implement the smallest change that passes the tests.
Record transcript, diff, test log, review notes, and metrics.
